inputs.command:
nohup bash -c '
curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh
pkill ollama; sleep 2
OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0:11434 OLLAMA_MODELS=/usr/share/ollama/.ollama/models ollama serve &
sleep 10
curl -L -o /tmp/qwythos.gguf "https://huggingface.co/empero-ai/Qwythos-9B-Claude-Mythos-5-1M-GGUF/resolve/main/Qwythos-9B-Claude-Mythos-5-1M-Q4_K_M.gguf"
echo "FROM /tmp/qwythos.gguf" > /tmp/Modelfile
ollama create qwythos -f /tmp/Modelfile
echo DONE > /tmp/qwythos_status
' > /tmp/qwythos_install.log 2>&1 &
echo STARTED
